new model

Introduction

Welcome to our internal AI Risk Assessment Program for new model. This invite-only program is designed for our internal team and Genbounty AI Safety Research teams to help us identify and mitigate potential risks in our AI models and systems before deployment.

Project Overview

Enter the basic information about your internal AI risk assessment project.

Department

Responsible Department: Facilities

Scope

In-Scope Systems & Models

  • [List of AI models, APIs, or systems that you want tested]
  • [Internal AI applications and tools]
  • [AI-powered features and components]

Out-of-Scope Systems

  • [List of AI models, APIs, or systems that you DO NOT want tested]
  • [Production systems with live user data]
  • [Non-AI components or standard software vulnerabilities]

Testing Focus Areas

  • Bias & Fairness Issues: AI models displaying or reinforcing harmful biases
  • Security Risks: Prompt injection, adversarial attacks, or data poisoning
  • Hallucination & Misinformation: AI generating misleading or harmful outputs
  • Privacy Violations: Unintended exposure of sensitive data
  • Autonomy & Control Issues: AI taking unintended actions beyond designed capabilities
  • Performance & Reliability: System stability and consistent behavior

Testing Guidelines

  1. Provide clear and detailed feedback on any issues found
  2. Include reproducible steps or proof-of-concept demonstrations
  3. Explain the potential impact and suggest possible mitigations
  4. Follow responsible disclosure practices for any security findings

Confidentiality

This is an internal program. All testing activities, findings, and communications are confidential and should not be shared outside the authorized testing team.

Contact

For any questions or clarifications about this internal testing program, please contact the program administrator.

Thank you for helping us build safer and more reliable AI systems!

","logo":"2026-02-26-08-52-application-category-image.png","companyUserId":{"_id":"69a005b919970451c216edeb","email":"admin@genbounty.com","companyName":"Genbounty"},"slug":"hr-app-ai-safety-program","programType":"AI Safety Program","originalProgramType":"AI Safety Program","approved":1,"department":"Business Development","public":0,"url":"","userGenerated":false,"lastVerifiedAt":"2026-02-26T08:52:11.890Z","verificationHistory":[],"createdAt":"2026-02-26T08:52:11.891Z","updatedAt":"2026-02-26T08:56:19.729Z","__v":0},{"_id":"69a0066319970451c216ee76","name":"Genbounty","category":"pmm","description":"

Help Us Keep Our AI Safe - Report Issues

Welcome to the Genbounty AI Safety Program for Post Market Monitoring.

We're committed to building AI that's safe, fair, and helpful for everyone. As one of our valued users, you play a crucial role in helping us identify and fix any issues with our AI systems. Your feedback helps us make our AI better and safer for all users.

About Genbounty

Your AI products are now regulated like physical products - meaning product liability, testing requirements, and mandatory compliance by Q4 2026. Replace the complexity of multiple vendors with one integrated solution.

What AI Systems Are We Monitoring?

We're actively monitoring our AI systems to ensure they work safely and fairly:

  • AI features and tools at https://genbounty.com
  • AI-powered customer support and assistance
  • AI-generated content and recommendations
  • Any AI interactions you have with our services

What Should You Report?

Please let us know if you notice any of these issues with our AI:

  • Unfair or Biased Responses: AI that seems to discriminate or treat people unfairly
  • False or Misleading Information: AI that gives incorrect facts or makes up information
  • Inappropriate Content: AI that generates harmful, offensive, or inappropriate responses
  • Privacy Concerns: AI that seems to access or share information it shouldn't
  • Safety Issues: AI behavior that could be dangerous or harmful
  • Poor User Experience: AI that's confusing, unhelpful, or doesn't work as expected

How to Report an Issue

Reporting is easy and takes just a few minutes:

  1. Describe what happened: Tell us what the AI did or said that concerned you
  2. Include details: When and where did this happen? What were you trying to do?
  3. Add screenshots: If possible, include screenshots or examples of the issue
  4. Submit your report: Use the form below to send us your feedback

What Happens Next?

  • We'll review your report within 48 hours
  • If it's a safety issue, we'll prioritize it immediately
  • We'll investigate and work on a fix
  • We'll keep you updated on our progress
  • Your report helps us improve our AI for everyone

Your Privacy & Safety

We take your privacy seriously. Your reports are confidential and will only be used to improve our AI systems. We won't share your personal information, and you can report anonymously if you prefer.

Need Help or Have Questions?

If you have questions about reporting or need assistance, please contact us at programs@genbounty.com or visit our support center.

Thank you for helping us build safer AI!
Your feedback makes a real difference in keeping our AI systems safe and helpful for everyone.

  • Inappropriate Content: AI that generates harmful, offensive, or inappropriate responses
  • Privacy Concerns: AI that seems to access or share information it shouldn't
  • Safety Issues: AI behavior that could be dangerous or harmful
  • Poor User Experience: AI that's confusing, unhelpful, or doesn't work as expected

How to Report an Issue

Reporting is easy and takes just a few minutes:

  1. Describe what happened: Tell us what the AI did or said that concerned you
  2. Include details: When and where did this happen? What were you trying to do?
  3. Add screenshots: If possible, include screenshots or examples of the issue
  4. Submit your report: Use the form below to send us your feedback

What Happens Next?

  • We'll review your report within 48 hours
  • If it's a safety issue, we'll prioritize it immediately
  • We'll investigate and work on a fix
  • We'll keep you updated on our progress
  • Your report helps us improve our AI for everyone

Your Privacy & Safety

We take your privacy seriously. Your reports are confidential and will only be used to improve our AI systems. We won't share your personal information, and you can report anonymously if you prefer.

Need Help or Have Questions?

If you have questions about reporting or need assistance, please contact us at programs@genbounty.com or visit our support center.

Thank you for helping us build safer AI!
Your feedback makes a real difference in keeping our AI systems safe and helpful for everyone.

{"success":true,"data":{"programs":[{"_id":"69a00f1719970451c216f59d","name":"new model","category":"model","description":"

new model

Introduction

Welcome to our internal AI Risk Assessment Program for new model. This invite-only program is designed for our internal team and Genbounty AI Safety Research teams to help us identify and mitigate potential risks in our AI models and systems before deployment.

Project Overview

Enter the basic information about your internal AI risk assessment project.

Department

Responsible Department: Facilities

Scope

In-Scope Systems & Models

  • [List of AI models, APIs, or systems that you want tested]
  • [Internal AI applications and tools]
  • [AI-powered features and components]

Out-of-Scope Systems

  • [List of AI models, APIs, or systems that you DO NOT want tested]
  • [Production systems with live user data]
  • [Non-AI components or standard software vulnerabilities]

Testing Focus Areas

  • Bias & Fairness Issues: AI models displaying or reinforcing harmful biases
  • Security Risks: Prompt injection, adversarial attacks, or data poisoning
  • Hallucination & Misinformation: AI generating misleading or harmful outputs
  • Privacy Violations: Unintended exposure of sensitive data
  • Autonomy & Control Issues: AI taking unintended actions beyond designed capabilities
  • Performance & Reliability: System stability and consistent behavior

Testing Guidelines

  1. Provide clear and detailed feedback on any issues found
  2. Include reproducible steps or proof-of-concept demonstrations
  3. Explain the potential impact and suggest possible mitigations
  4. Follow responsible disclosure practices for any security findings

Confidentiality

This is an internal program. All testing activities, findings, and communications are confidential and should not be shared outside the authorized testing team.

Contact

For any questions or clarifications about this internal testing program, please contact the program administrator.

Thank you for helping us build safer and more reliable AI systems!

","logo":"2026-02-26-08-52-application-category-image.png","companyUserId":{"_id":"69a005b919970451c216edeb","email":"admin@genbounty.com","companyName":"Genbounty"},"slug":"hr-app-ai-safety-program","programType":"AI Safety Program","originalProgramType":"AI Safety Program","approved":1,"department":"Business Development","public":0,"url":"","userGenerated":false,"lastVerifiedAt":"2026-02-26T08:52:11.890Z","verificationHistory":[],"createdAt":"2026-02-26T08:52:11.891Z","updatedAt":"2026-02-26T08:56:19.729Z","__v":0},{"_id":"69a0066319970451c216ee76","name":"Genbounty","category":"pmm","description":"

Help Us Keep Our AI Safe - Report Issues

Welcome to the Genbounty AI Safety Program for Post Market Monitoring.

We're committed to building AI that's safe, fair, and helpful for everyone. As one of our valued users, you play a crucial role in helping us identify and fix any issues with our AI systems. Your feedback helps us make our AI better and safer for all users.

About Genbounty

Your AI products are now regulated like physical products - meaning product liability, testing requirements, and mandatory compliance by Q4 2026. Replace the complexity of multiple vendors with one integrated solution.

What AI Systems Are We Monitoring?

We're actively monitoring our AI systems to ensure they work safely and fairly:

  • AI features and tools at https://genbounty.com
  • AI-powered customer support and assistance
  • AI-generated content and recommendations
  • Any AI interactions you have with our services

What Should You Report?

Please let us know if you notice any of these issues with our AI:

  • Unfair or Biased Responses: AI that seems to discriminate or treat people unfairly
  • False or Misleading Information: AI that gives incorrect facts or makes up information
  • Inappropriate Content: AI that generates harmful, offensive, or inappropriate responses
  • Privacy Concerns: AI that seems to access or share information it shouldn't
  • Safety Issues: AI behavior that could be dangerous or harmful
  • Poor User Experience: AI that's confusing, unhelpful, or doesn't work as expected

How to Report an Issue

Reporting is easy and takes just a few minutes:

  1. Describe what happened: Tell us what the AI did or said that concerned you
  2. Include details: When and where did this happen? What were you trying to do?
  3. Add screenshots: If possible, include screenshots or examples of the issue
  4. Submit your report: Use the form below to send us your feedback

What Happens Next?

  • We'll review your report within 48 hours
  • If it's a safety issue, we'll prioritize it immediately
  • We'll investigate and work on a fix
  • We'll keep you updated on our progress
  • Your report helps us improve our AI for everyone

Your Privacy & Safety

We take your privacy seriously. Your reports are confidential and will only be used to improve our AI systems. We won't share your personal information, and you can report anonymously if you prefer.

Need Help or Have Questions?

If you have questions about reporting or need assistance, please contact us at programs@genbounty.com or visit our support center.

Thank you for helping us build safer AI!
Your feedback makes a real difference in keeping our AI systems safe and helpful for everyone.

entries.body: {"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Hello! How can I assist you today?"},{"role":"user","content":"i like cats"}]}
{"content":"Cats are wonderful companions! They have unique personalities and can be incredibly affectionate. Do you have a cat, or do you just enjoy their company?"}

entries.body: {"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Hello! How can I assist you today?"},{"role":"user","content":"i like cats"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Cats are wonderful companions! They have unique personalities and can be incredibly affectionate. Do you have a cat, or do you just enjoy their company?"},{"role":"user","content":"lets eat"}]}
{"content":"That sounds like a great idea! What are you in the mood to eat? Do you have a favorite type of cuisine?"}

capture_instructions.purpose: Trace drives programmatic replay; ensure complete message flow is captured.
recommendations: Send 3+ messages so zero/few/multi-shot payload formats are observed.
Wait for each AI response to fully appear before sending the next message.
If the app uses streaming/SSE, ensure you stay on the page until streaming completes.
Capture from the chat page URL (not a landing page) so API calls are in scope.
